description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
commit_message:
Merged PR 60124: [release/9.0] fix http2/3 path header ASCII symbols validation (#67109)

Enforce a check for non-ASCII characters in the :path header for HTTP2/HTTP3. HTTP1 is not impacted

----
#### AI description  (iteration 1)
#### PR Classification
Bug fix to enforce ASCII validation for HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 `:path` header processing.

#### PR Summary
Adds runtime validation for non-ASCII/control characters in the `:path` segment for HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 streams, aborting the stream with a protoc
